summary: Comprehensive testing of Evolution Temporelle charts on Dashboard and Evaluations/Notes page features. All backend APIs (GET /api/stats/evolution, GET /api/stats/notes) return correct data. All frontend features working correctly including charts, tabs, and navigation.

issues: 'Profil incomplet' notification appears on page load - minor UX issue but not blocking

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stats/evolution returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: Evolution data has 12 months array (May 2025 - Apr 2026)
Backend: Evolution cumul data includes eleves, enseignants, etablissements arrays
Backend: Evolution inscriptions_mensuelles has 12 months with eleves/enseignants counts
Backend: GET /api/stats/notes returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: Notes par_matiere has 15 subjects with moyenne, count, min, max
Backend: Notes distribution has grade ranges with counts
Backend: Notes par_trimestre has 3 trimesters (T1, T2, T3)
Backend: Total notes count is 59,238 as expected from seed data
Backend: All averages are in valid range (0-20)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Evolution Temporelle' section heading
Frontend: Area chart 'Evolution des effectifs (12 derniers mois)' displays correctly with Eleves/Enseignants/Etablissements
Frontend: Bar chart 'Nouvelles inscriptions mensuelles' displays correctly with Eleves/Enseignants
Frontend: Eleves page has 'Evaluations et Notes' button with data-testid='btn-evaluations'
Frontend: Clicking button navigates to /dashboard/evaluations
Frontend: Evaluations page shows disclaimer banner with amber/yellow styling
Frontend: Disclaimer text mentions 'indicatif' and 'bulletin officiel'
Frontend: 4 stat cards display correctly - Moyenne Generale (11.74/20), Total Notes (59,238), Matieres (15), Trimestres (3)
Frontend: 3 tabs present - Vue Generale, Par Matiere, Distribution
Frontend: Vue Generale tab shows radar chart and trimester bar chart
Frontend: Par Matiere tab shows horizontal bar chart and detailed subjects table
Frontend: Distribution tab shows pie chart and progress bars for grade ranges
Frontend: Appreciation legend shows 6 levels (Excellent, Tres Bien, Bien, Assez Bien, Passable, Insuffisant)
Frontend: 'Evaluations' is NOT in the main navigation menu (correct - accessible only via Eleves page)
seed_data_creation: Notes and bulletins were seeded via seed_notes.py (59,238 notes, 6,000 bulletins) - already done by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Evolution Temporelle and Evaluations features are complete and working. Backend endpoints /api/stats/evolution and /api/stats/notes return correct data. Frontend displays all charts correctly. Evaluations page is accessible only via button on Eleves page (not in main nav). All data-testid attributes are properly implemented.

evolution_charts.area_chart: Shows cumulative growth of Eleves/Enseignants/Etablissements over 12 months (May 2025 - Apr 2026)
evolution_charts.bar_chart: Shows monthly new enrollments for Eleves and Enseignants

evaluations_page.disclaimer: Amber/yellow banner with text about indicative data and official bulletin

navigation.access_method: Button on Eleves page with data-testid='btn-evaluations'
